subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Concerning the teacher of whom thou didst write, proceed as thou hast already arranged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان در خصوص معلم مرقوم نموده بودید همان قسم که مجرا داشتید همان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @review of publications, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @martyrs and martyrdom
